title: I just wanted to remind you Hideaki Annos Birthday
display_title: I just wanted to remind you Hideaki Annos Birthday
wikitext:
[]: I just wanted to remind you! (Hideaki Anno's Birthday)             Quote Post by EXELION » Sun May 22, 2011 11:00 am HIDEAKI ANNO-SAMA has birthday today! :-)

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun May 22, 2011 11:57 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun May 22, 2011 12:16 pm And I didn't even remember to get a present.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Sun May 22, 2011 1:09 pm Happy Birthday Anno! I wonder how he'll be celebrating it... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun May 22, 2011 1:18 pm What can you gift to a man who can buy himself anything he wants?

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sun May 22, 2011 1:48 pm To Anno: Happy Birthday. Here's hoping your ego down the line won't give in and give us films more unbearable than humanity possible, or, at least, films that prove that the you before then was way more admirable than then, like other animation directors I know. 'Course, that hasn't happened (yet), so until then, here's to one of the few anime directors out that can rightly be classified as a "genius" or so forth, and whose works can actually be taken seriously without ridicule.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 22, 2011 6:00 pm How old is he now? Anyway, it's great to have geniuses like him on this world that gift us with great stuff like EVA and Nadia! I wonder what sorts of presents he got. Being the workaholic he is, it probably didn't keep him from working on Q. XD Then again, I WANT my Q... badly... now... XD 2.0 was already mindblowingly stunning, so if he surpasses himself once again....

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun May 22, 2011 6:02 pm Kendrix wrote: How old is he now?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sun May 22, 2011 6:35 pm child of Lilith wrote: I believe someone in the birthday thread said he's 51.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 22, 2011 6:37 pm 51? Already? Well, then let's hope that he finishes Rebuild before he's senile XD

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sun May 22, 2011 6:55 pm Kendrix wrote: 51? Already? Well, then let's hope that he finishes Rebuild before he's senile XD

[]:             Quote Post by Cow Bell Man » Sun May 22, 2011 7:03 pm Happy H-day Anno! I wish I could be there, but I can't stop watching this anime called Evangelion. Some crazy cracker made it. Mabe you can get some pointers from that guy. :p

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sun May 22, 2011 7:12 pm Anno was born the same year as my dad was...how coincidental. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun May 22, 2011 7:15 pm And Toe Mash was born the same day as Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sun May 22, 2011 7:17 pm ^ His new nickname is Young Gendou

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun May 22, 2011 7:18 pm symbv wrote: ^ His new nickname is Young Gendou

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sun May 22, 2011 7:20 pm Stryker wrote: As much as a good idea as it seems, nicknames that are longer then the original don't exactly work..

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Sun May 22, 2011 10:37 pm happy birthday anno!

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun May 22, 2011 11:02 pm A toast, to everyone's favorite nutty animator! Always be crazy, Anno-san; we love you that way.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon May 23, 2011 2:46 pm symbv wrote: Hmm...Guess people with user name like "V" cannot have any nickname then?
